scope: High-centrality test (Round 1 of the adaptive test->sweep): 12 hub module docs never previously doc-centric-audited.

cap_probe.note: No rate-limit wait (gap << 5 min). The 40.7 min wall-clock was driven by large hub docs (module_30 = 1741 lines, module_32/11/52/56), not capping. Window has ample headroom.

per_doc.label: module_11
per_doc.key: Spine CLEAN (32 q11_cost_reg terms, 27 source-module attributions, vm_maccs_costs confirmed consumed-not-produced, M11 declares only vm_cost_glo+v11_cost_reg). Bugs in scaling/description/citation layers.

per_doc.key: s15_exo_diet=0 CONFIRMED (no inverted-Boolean). Major: age 18->21 (x3); pm_kcal_pc_initial consumer M16->M70.

per_doc.key: CRITICAL: vm_supply equation-consumer = M21 ONLY; phantoms M18/20/55/50/32/53 removed. +4 Major (vm_dem_seed M60->M50, vm_dem_food M55 phantom, deps list, invented vm_import/export). M18 phantom confirmed; M70-add refuted (comment-only).

per_doc.key: flexreg_apr16 confirmed. Major: wood/woodfuel NOT zero at cell level (M73 populates); consumer set M15 phantom + M38/M71 omitted + 7 transitive-as-direct.

per_doc.label: module_29
per_doc.key: detail_apr24 confirmed; 16 eqs correct. Major: fabricated M14/M16 upstream deps; wrong carbon-density names + M59-not-M52 attribution; 'four carbon pools' false (q29_carbon ag_pools={vegc,litc}).

per_doc.key: simple_apr24 confirmed. 3 CRITICAL consumer-set: vm_area phantom M17/M38 + omitted M29 (M32 retained as .l/.lo presolve reader); vm_carbon_stock_croparea false-direct M52/M56 removed (real consumer M29 via q29_carbon). All verified vs develop.

per_doc.key: Algebra + all 15 scalar defaults correct; vm_carbon_stock populator treatment CORRECT. 14 bugs: 6 Major (citation-drift-to-different-equation, _uncalib-vs-calibrated density, 2 wrong producer attributions). Fixer correctly REFUSED invalid 'affexp' c32_aff_policy option (pol32={none,npi,ndc}).

per_doc.key: Exceptionally accurate (macceff_aug22; all eqns/formulas/decls/consumer sets verified; advisory refuted). 1 Minor: im_maccs_mitigation presolve.gms:57->58.

per_doc.label: module_52
per_doc.key: G2 spine fully correct (populator set, M56 decl site, line-4 consumers, formula, defaults). Checker phantom-consumer lead (M35/M32) REFUTED. All defects = PR#869 citation drift.

per_doc.label: module_56
per_doc.key: G2 chain + GWP 28/265 + price units CORRECT. Major: vm_cdr_aff unit tC/ha/yr->'mio. tC' (checker confirmed); phantom price_jan20 realization; wrong carbon-stock populator set in summary line; bad cap arithmetic.

per_doc.label: module_70
per_doc.key: fbask_jan16 confirmed (advisory refuted, NOT fbask_jul23). Major: vm_dem_feed->M31 is transitive via M16+M21 (MANDATE 17); scaling.gms values 1e4/1e5 not 10e5/10e5.

vm_carbon_stock DECLARED M56:34 not M52; M52 reads via q52_emis_co2_actual; full M56 pricing chain verified; actualNoAcEst default; populators 29/31/32/34/35/59. 1 Minor (CSV-absent precision).

gate.self_heal_class: bare-basename / partial-path file:line citations (MANDATE 16) mis-resolved by walk-order; content verified correct, full paths added; 0 reverts

criticals_spotchecked.claim: vm_supply equation-consumer = M21 only; M18/20/55/50/32/53 phantom
criticals_spotchecked.evidence: rg 'vm_supply\(' develop: declared+populated 16_demand/sector_may15; equation-read only in 21_trade/*

criticals_spotchecked.claim: vm_area equation-consumers = 18,29,41,42,50,53,59; M17/M38 phantom; M29 omitted
criticals_spotchecked.evidence: rg 'vm_area\(' develop: exactly those 7 modules; zero hits in 17_production / 38_factor_costs
32_forestry/dynamic_may24/presolve.gms:17 p32_aff_pot = 0.95*(sum(vm_area.l - vm_area.lo)). Doc correctly distinguishes this .l/.lo reader from the 7 equation-consumers.

criticals_spotchecked.claim: vm_carbon_stock_croparea direct consumer = M29 only; M52/M56 not direct
criticals_spotchecked.evidence: rg develop: read only in 29_cropland/*/equations.gms (q29_carbon aggregation); zero M52/M56 hits

verification_lesson: A paren-restricted grep ('vm_area\(') MISSES .l/.lo/.fx/.m/.up solution-level reads. My initial vm_area\( probe found no M32 hit and I nearly flagged the M32 listing as a phantom; broadening to 'vm_area' (no paren) immediately surfaced the .l/.lo read in presolve.gms:17. When verifying whether module X consumes a variable, grep BOTH the equation form 'var(' AND the attribute form 'var.' before concluding absence. (Extends bash-grep-r-unreliable-magpie.)

decision_rule.interpretation: Hypothesis confirmed hard: every high-centrality hub doc carried bugs; dominant class is wrong consumer/populator sets + citation drift; rate (6.17/doc) exceeds the prior push's ~3.7/doc first-audit rate. The un-audited corpus is NOT trustworthy at the consumer-set/citation level.

fixer_discipline_notes: module_32 fixer refused an auditor over-claim: 'affexp' is NOT a valid c32_aff_policy option (pol32 set = none/npi/ndc); applied only the verifiable part (Default: npi).
Several fed baseline advisories correctly refuted by auditors: module_12 pm_interest 'TC' (n/a this round), module_52 M35/M32 phantom-consumer, module_70 fbask_jul23, module_14 commit-provenance.
note: All commits local on magpie-agent main, pending user review. Nothing pushed.
